description: SQL-specific golden dataset for schema-aware pipeline evaluation. Each entry has a natural language question, expected SQL pattern components, and ground truth SQL for deterministic comparison.
schema_context: Clinical NCD database with patient_tracker, patient_visit, patient_diagnosis, bp_log, glucose_log, screening_log, site, organization, region, district

entries.query: How many active patients are registered?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false;

entries.query: What is the distribution of patients by gender?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY gender ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

entries.query: How many patients were screened for hypertension last month?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_tracker_id) AS screened_count FROM screening_log WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND created_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);

entries.query: What percentage of diagnosed hypertension patients are on treatment?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN is_on_treatment = true THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS treatment_rate FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_hypertension_diagnosed = true;

entries.query: Show the NCD care cascade for diabetes
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT 'Screened' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_screened = true UNION ALL SELECT 'Diagnosed', COUNT(*) FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_diabetes_diagnosed = true UNION ALL SELECT 'On Treatment', COUNT(*) FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_diabetes_diagnosed = true AND is_on_treatment = true UNION ALL SELECT 'Controlled', COUNT(*) FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_diabetes_diagnosed = true AND is_on_treatment = true AND glucose_value IS NOT NULL AND glucose_value < 126;

entries.query: How many patients are there per site?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

entries.query: What are the top 5 sites by patient count?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY patient_count DESC LIMIT 5;

entries.query: What is the monthly trend of new patient registrations this year?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at)::date AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_registrations FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at) ORDER BY month;

entries.query: Compare male vs female hypertension control rates
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS total_patients, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_bp_controlled = true THEN 1 END) AS controlled, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN is_bp_controlled = true THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS control_rate FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_hypertension_diagnosed = true GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender;

entries.query: Show patient count by organization and site
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id JOIN organization o ON s.organization_id = o.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY o.name, s.name ORDER BY organization_name, patient_count DESC;

entries.query: What is the average age of patients?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(age), 1) AS average_age FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false;

entries.query: Show me details for patient with ID 12345
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM patient_tracker WHERE id = 12345;

entries.query: How many patients have controlled blood pressure?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS controlled_bp_count FROM patient_tracker WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND is_hypertension_diagnosed = true AND is_bp_controlled = true;

entries.query: Show the screening coverage rate by site
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS total_patients, COUNT(CASE WHEN pt.is_screened = true THEN 1 END) AS screened, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN pt.is_screened = true THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(pt.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY coverage_rate DESC;

entries.query: Which sites have more than 1000 active patients?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT s.name AS site_name, COUNT(pt.id) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker pt JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id WHERE pt.is_active = true AND pt.is_deleted = false GROUP BY s.name HAVING COUNT(pt.id) > 1000 ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

entries.query: How many patient visits happened this month?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS visit_count FROM patient_visit WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND visit_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND visit_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month';

entries.query: What is the distribution of diagnoses across patients?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT diagnosis_type, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_tracker_id) AS patient_count FROM patient_diagnosis WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY diagnosis_type ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

entries.query: Show average systolic BP by month over the last 6 months
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', bp_taken_at)::date AS month, ROUND(AVG(systolic), 1) AS avg_systolic FROM bp_log WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND bp_taken_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY date_trunc('month', bp_taken_at) ORDER BY month;

entries.query: Show average glucose values by organization
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.name AS organization_name, ROUND(AVG(gl.glucose_value), 1) AS avg_glucose FROM glucose_log gl JOIN patient_tracker pt ON gl.patient_tracker_id = pt.id JOIN site s ON pt.site_id = s.id JOIN organization o ON s.organization_id = o.id WHERE gl.is_active = true AND gl.is_deleted = false GROUP BY o.name ORDER BY avg_glucose DESC;

entries.query: Are there any patients in site 5?
entries.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patient_tracker WHERE site_id = 5 AND is_active = true AND is_deleted = false;
